data.title: RED: Write structural boundary test for brainstorm SKILL.md two-call no-arg block
data.description: Write structural test asserting brainstorm SKILL.md no-arg block contains: (1) sprint-list-epics.sh call with --max-children=0 (zero-child), (2) sprint-list-epics.sh call with --min-children=1 --without-tag=brainstorm:complete (scrutiny-gap), (3) two labeled presentation section markers distinguishing the categories. Test FAILS before SKILL.md is updated. testing_mode: RED. Rule 5 compliant — structural boundary only, not prose content.
